1 - Lagging: APIs frequently miss SLAs; unpredictable release timelines causing frontend/mobile blockers; deployment velocity significantly below industry benchmarks
2 - Developing: APIs released on inconsistent schedules; occasional missed SLAs; delivery velocity trending upward but still behind target
3 - Proficient: APIs delivered predictably with documented timelines; meets 95%+ SLA commitments; deployment velocity aligns with planning
4 - Exemplary: APIs delivered with exceptional predictability and speed; consistently exceeds SLA targets; rapid iteration enabling quick pivots for consuming teams

1 - Lagging: Sprint commitments are consistently missed; API delivery timelines are unreliable. Backend is the bottleneck for Frontend, Mobile, and Hardware teams who depend on API readiness.
2 - Developing: Predictable within a 50-70% margin; frequent scope creep on integration work. Stakeholder teams learn to pad their own timelines to compensate for Backend delays.
3 - Proficient: 80%+ of committed API endpoints and integrations are delivered on time and as scoped. Downstream teams (Frontend, Mobile, Hardware, GameDev) can plan confidently around Backend delivery dates.
4 - Exemplary: High precision in forecasting; delivery timelines are data-driven using historical velocity from ClickUp. The team of 17 delivers with near-perfect predictability even on complex 3rd party integrations.
